title: Signal-to-Noise Ratio and Sample Size Govern Representational Alignment in Neural Networks
summary: Neural networks are known to develop latent representations that are $aligned$, namely structurally similar across networks trained with different architectures, training protocols, or training datasets. We study this phenomenon in a controlled setting, where we train an ensemble of networks on regression and classification tasks using training sets perturbed by independent realizations of a noise process. We show that the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) and the training sample size influence the alignment in qualitatively similar ways in networks trained on real-world datasets and in an extremely simple $linear$ network with a single hidden layer, for which the alignment can be estimated analytically. Across linear and nonlinear networks, regression and classification tasks, and both synthetic and real-world data, we consistently observe that alignment varies monotonically with SNR but non-monotonically with training sample size. In particular, the alignment is minimized near the interpolation threshold, and a stronger alignment does not necessarily correspond to better generalization error. These findings reveal a non-trivial dependence of alignment on data quality and quantity, decoupled from generalization performance.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了信噪比(SNR)和训练样本量如何影响神经网络的表征对齐现象。研究表明，对齐程度与SNR呈单调变化，与样本量呈非单调变化，且对齐程度并不一定与泛化性能相关。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注神经网络表征对齐的量化，但缺乏对数据质量和数量如何影响对齐的理论和机制理解，以及对齐是否能预测模型质量。本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 研究采用两种方法：首先，在简单的两层线性网络中进行严格的解析分析；其次，通过数值模拟，将分析扩展到非线性网络，并在真实数据集上进行实验，比较线性网络和非线性网络的结果。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，在线性网络和非线性网络、回归和分类任务、合成数据和真实数据中，表征对齐程度均与SNR呈单调变化，与训练样本量呈非单调变化。对齐程度在插值阈值附近最小化，且更强的对齐并不一定对应更好的泛化误差。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了数据质量和数量与表征对齐之间的一种非平凡依赖关系，这种关系与泛化性能解耦。这些发现有助于发展表征学习的理论，并为理解独立训练的网络如何编码相同的信息提供依据。

title: Sampling Data with Chains of Forward-Backward Diffusion Steps
summary: Sampling from learned high-dimensional distributions is a foundational computational problem. We introduce U-turn chains: Markov chains obtained by iterating short forward-backward steps of a diffusion model, in which each step proposes a move that remains on the learned data manifold and, paired with a Metropolis-Hastings correction, samples from energy-modified targets. For synthetic languages, we show that minimal U-turn dynamics undergoes an ergodicity-breaking phase transition driven by fragmentation of the data manifold; ergodicity is restored at larger U-turn magnitude. In the non-ergodic regime, low-level features relax faster than high-level ones, an ordering that inverts only at sufficiently large U-turn magnitude. We test these predictions on natural language and natural images. In both modalities, minimal U-turns relax slowly, especially for high-level features approximated by deep representations in CNNs or LLMs. The layer-ordering inversion appears only at large noise when mixing is efficient -- signatures consistent with strongly constrained, weakly mixing local dynamics. We discuss the implications of these results for sampling with diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了U-turn链，通过迭代短的扩散模型正向-反向步骤进行采样，并在合成语言和自然语言/图像数据中研究了其遍历性和结构放松行为。
AI.motivation: 高维概率分布的采样是一个基础计算问题，传统MCMC算法在目标分布集中于未知低维流形时效率下降。扩散模型通过学习流形提供了一种互补方法，本文旨在研究使用扩散模型进行采样时，U-turn链的遍历性和结构放松行为。
AI.method: 本文引入了U-turn链，通过迭代正向扩散（添加噪声）和反向去噪步骤构建马尔可夫链。研究人员在合成语言（Random Hierarchy Model）和自然语言/图像数据中分析了U-turn链的遍历性（是否能充分探索数据流形）以及不同层次结构（高层和低层特征）的放松速度。
AI.result: 在合成语言中，最小U-turn动态经历了遍历性断裂的相变，较大的U-turn幅度可以恢复遍历性。低层特征比高层特征更快地放松，这种顺序在较大的U-turn幅度下才会反转。在自然语言和图像中，最小U-turn的放松速度较慢，尤其对于由CNN或LLM表示的高层特征。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果揭示了U-turn链的遍历性和结构放松行为，表明最小U-turn在探索高层特征时效率较低，并且层级结构的逆转只在特定条件下出现。这些发现对使用扩散模型进行采样具有重要意义，并为设计更有效的采样算法提供了指导。
